name: hub-mediacenter-agent-pc
description: Agent PC pour Hub MediaCenter (Windows/Linux/macOS HTPC)

scripts.package: npm run bundle && pkg . --targets node20-win-x64 --output dist/hub-agent.exe --compress GZip
scripts.package:all: npm run bundle && pkg . --targets node20-win-x64,node20-linux-x64,node20-macos-x64 --out-path dist/ --compress GZip
